payload.name: Fix kompoz security issues
payload.description: Исправить проблемы безопасности и качества кода в проекте kompoz, выявленные в ходе анализа и код-ревью. Критические: symlink path traversal (server/utils/fs.js), XSS в карте (public/map.html). Высокие: timing-атаки в авторизации (server/index.js), отсутствие Secure-флага у cookie, XSS в sidebar (public/js/sidebar.js). Средние и низкие: утечка путей в ошибках, отсутствие rate limiting, innerHTML в toast, inline event handlers, отсутствие вайтлиста расширений, parseCookies падает на некорректном input. Нужно исправить код, запустить тесты, убедиться что ничего не сломалось.

goal.answer: Исправить проблемы безопасности и качества кода в проекте kompoz, выявленные в ходе анализа и код-ревью. Нужно исправить код, запустить тесты, убедиться что ничего не сломалось.

payload.plain: Исправить проблемы безопасности и качества кода в проекте kompoz, выявленные в ходе анализа и код-ревью. Критические: symlink path traversal (server/utils/fs.js), XSS в карте (public/map.html). Высокие: timing-атаки в авторизации (server/index.js), отсутствие Secure-флага у cookie, XSS в sidebar (public/js/sidebar.js). Средние и низкие: утечка путей в ошибках, отсутствие rate limiting, innerHTML в toast, inline event handlers, отсутствие вайтлиста расширений, parseCookies падает на некорректном input. Нужно исправить код, запустить тесты, убедиться что ничего не сломалось.

criteria.answer:
All Critical and High severity issues from analysis.md are fixed in source code with file:line evidence
All Medium and Low severity issues from analysis.md are fixed or mitigated (conditional where breaking)
At least one new test added per modified backend module (fs.js, index.js, files.js); test files compile and pass (`npm test`)
Test results are documented (pass/fail count) in `.kimchi/docs/test-output-fixes.txt`
No production functionality is broken: existing smoke test still passes, server starts without errors (`node server/index.js` sanity check)
Restrictive changes (Secure cookie, extension whitelist) are conditional or configurable, not hard-enforced

plain: All Critical and High severity issues from analysis.md are fixed in source code with file:line evidence
All Medium and Low severity issues from analysis.md are fixed or mitigated (conditional where breaking)
At least one new test added per modified backend module (fs.js, index.js, files.js); test files compile and pass (`npm test`)
Test results are documented (pass/fail count) in `.kimchi/docs/test-output-fixes.txt`
No production functionality is broken: existing smoke test still passes, server starts without errors (`node server/index.js` sanity check)
Restrictive changes (Secure cookie, extension whitelist) are conditional or configurable, not hard-enforced

constraints.answer: Do not add new runtime or production dependencies without explicit user approval, Make restrictive changes conditional/configurable as agreed in interview, Preserve existing functionality; the single smoke test must still pass, Follow existing code style and conventions, Do not modify git history with destructive commands

plain: Do not add new runtime or production dependencies without explicit user approval
Make restrictive changes conditional/configurable as agreed in interview
Preserve existing functionality; the single smoke test must still pass
Follow existing code style and conventions
Do not modify git history with destructive commands

phaseSnapshots.name: Security Fixes
phaseSnapshots.goal: Fix all identified security issues across backend and frontend, add tests, verify no regressions
phaseSnapshots.description: Apply fixes for all 13 classified issues (Critical through Low) across server/utils/fs.js, server/index.js, server/routes/files.js, server/routes/projects.js, public/map.html, public/js/sidebar.js, public/js/toast.js, public/editor.html. Add tests for modified backend modules. Run test suite. Verify server starts.

steps.description: Fix backend Critical and High issues: symlink path traversal in fs.js, timing attacks and cookie Secure flag in index.js
Fix backend Medium and Low issues: error path leaks in files.js and projects.js, rate limiting and parseCookies in index.js, extension whitelist in files.js
Fix frontend Critical and High issues: XSS in map.html tooltips, XSS in sidebar.js file list
Fix frontend Medium and Low issues: toast innerHTML, inline event handlers migration
Add backend tests for modified modules and run full test suite

verification.command: cd /opt/kompoz && npm test 2>&1 | tee /opt/kompoz/.kimchi/docs/test-output-fixes.txt | grep -E '^(ok|not ok|# pass|# fail)'

steps.description: Verify server starts without errors and document final results

verification.command: test -f /opt/kompoz/.kimchi/docs/test-output-fixes.txt && node -e "const app = require('/opt/kompoz/server/index.js'); console.log('Server exports:', typeof app); process.exit(0);"

assumptions.answer: Node.js 20+ and npm are available in the environment (verified in prior ferment); Frontend has no test harness; backend tests use the built-in `node:test` runner; The analysis.md and review.md findings are accurate and the suggested fixes are technically sound; All fixes are mechanical and localized; no architectural refactoring is required

result.stdout: cd /opt/kompoz && npm test 2>&1 | tee /opt/kompoz/.kimchi/docs/test-output-fixes.txt | grep -E '^(ok|not ok|# pass|# fail)'
test -f /opt/kompoz/.kimchi/docs/test-output-fixes.txt && node -e "const app = require('/opt/kompoz/server/index.js'); console.log('Server exports:', typeof app); process.exit(0);"

payload.summary: All security fixes applied across backend and frontend. 23 tests pass (0 failures), including new tests for fs.js, auth helpers, and files.js. Server starts without errors. Test output saved to `.kimchi/docs/test-output-fixes.txt`.

grade.rationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

payload.finalSummary: Все критические и высокие проблемы безопасности исправлены, добавлены тесты, сервер запускается без ошибок. Детальный отчет: 23 теста прошли, 0 ошибок; результаты сохранены в .kimchi/docs/test-output-fixes.txt.

grade.rationale: Real tests passed and the server starts, but verification leaned heavily on grep/sentinel checks for steps 1–4 rather than behavioral verification of every fix. Gate rationales (especially F2) summarize issue counts rather than citing file:line evidence for each of the 13 claimed fixes.
